target_text: This is an original human composition, not AI-generated content.
original_output: The track is human-composed. The nuanced vocal delivery, the organic feel of the piano, and the emotional depth of the lyrics all suggest a human touch. Additionally, the slight imperfections and variations in the performance are characteristic of human musicianship.
final_output: This is an original human composition, not AI-generated content. The track features expressive vocal delivery, nuanced dynamics, and organic instrumental textures that reflect human creativity and emotional depth.
